compiled_state.title: As an agent working in this codebase, I have clear rules about where documentation and tests belong
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Scope: Update CLAUDE.md to add a two-part plugin boundary rule. Update skill/prompt internal references that were identified during preplanning.

CLAUDE.md update: Add a plugin boundary rule in the Critical Rules section (not buried in narrative text). The rule must have two parts:
1. Positive enumeration: dev-team artifacts (designs, findings, archive, tests) belong in docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/, tests/ at project root
2. NEVER-statement: NEVER place dev-team artifacts inside plugins/dso/

The CLAUDE.md rule must use identical terminology to the doc-writer agent update (S4) to prevent agent interpretation drift.

Skill/prompt reference updates:
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: cascade-replan-protocol.md references (3 occurrences) updated to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md: remove sentence referencing playwright-cli-spike-report.md
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md: update output path from plugins/dso/docs/designs/<uuid>/ to docs/designs/<uuid>/ AND add prohibition against writing to plugins/dso/

Done Definitions:
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Critical Rules section contains a plugin boundary rule with both: list of permitted project-local artifact directories AND NEVER-statement prohibiting plugins/dso/
- [ ] Rule uses two-part constraint pattern (positive enumeration + NEVER-statement) not just a prohibition
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md: all 3 occurrences of plugins/dso/docs/designs/cascade-replan-protocol.md updated to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/cascade-replan-protocol.md
- [ ] Playwright-debug SKILL.md: no reference to playwright-cli-spike-report.md
- [ ] ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md: output path is docs/designs/<uuid>/ with prohibition against writing to plugins/dso/
- [ ] Terminology in CLAUDE.md rule matches S4 doc-writer.md update exactly (same directory names, same NEVER phrasing)
- [ ] git grep -r "plugins/dso/docs/designs\|plugins/dso/docs/findings\|plugins/dso/docs/archive" -- "plugins/dso/agents/" "plugins/dso/skills/" returns zero matches

Considerations:
- [Maintainability] Run terminology comparison between this story's CLAUDE.md edit and S4's doc-writer.md edit before closing either story — divergent phrasing causes agent interpretation drift
- [Maintainability] The NEVER-statement should appear before the positive enumeration in the rule (positional bias: agents weight earlier constraints more heavily)

Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked — proceed unless a significant assumption could send implementation in the wrong direction; document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: REPLAN_ESCALATE: DD5 for this story requires adding a NEVER statement referencing 'plugins/dso/' inside ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md, which is a distributed plugin file. Hardcoding the host-project install path 'plugins/dso/' in a distributed artifact is architecturally wrong — other host projects install the plugin at their own path. Reverted commit a141d296 which added the flawed prohibition. DD5 cannot be satisfied as written; story needs brainstorm-level re-examination to use host-agnostic language (e.g., '$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT' or relative plugin path conventions) instead of hardcoded 'plugins/dso/'.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
REPLAN: DD5 revised per corrected epic spec (brainstorm re-run 2026-04-10).

Original DD5 required adding a NEVER prohibition referencing plugins/dso/ to ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md. This is a category error — that file is distributed to host projects and cannot correctly reference a host-project-specific install path.

Revised DD5: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md contains the positive output path docs/designs/<uuid>/ with no hardcoded prohibition referencing the plugin install path by name. The positive path was already present before the reverted commit (a141d296). Verify it is present and clean — no prohibition language added.
comments.author: Test
